title: Argentinian Grilled Choripan
description: A simple and flavorful grilled chorizo sandwich popular in Argentina. Serve with toor dal for a unique twist.
instructions: 1. In a medium bowl, combine chimichurri ingredients and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes.
3. Grill chorizo for 2-3 minutes per side, or until nicely charred.
4. Meanwhile, toast bread rolls on grill or in oven.
5. Assemble sandwiches by slicing grilled chorizo and serving on toasted bread with a dollop of chimichurri and a sprinkle of parsley.
6. Serve toor dal on the side for a unique and flavorful pairing.
